title: Yaar Yaaro Naan Parthaen Lyrics Chinna
stanzas:
Yaar Yaaro Naan Parthaen Song Lyrics Chinna
#DImman #SPB

yaar yaaro naan parthaen
yaarum enakillai
en vazhiyil nee vandhaai
nanum enakillai

Kanneeril karuvaanen
kadal neeril uruvaanen
unnalae uyir aanen
neeyaaga naan aanen
neeyaaga naan aanen

enai yaarena kaettaal
oru sol podhum
neeyena naan solven

en mugavari kaettaal
oru varai podhum
un peyar naan solven

kobam odum narambugalil
veenayayi meettugiraai
eriyum theeyai
naan irundhen
dheebam yaetrugiraai

ada idhuvarai ingae
vazhandhadhu podhum
en naan ninaithirundhen

nee vazhkayin suvayai
arindhida vaithaai
marubadi pirandhu vitten

unai uyirin ulle
naan sumappaen
veliye vidamaatten
veliye vidamaatten

yaar yaaro naan parthaen
yaarum enakillai
en vazhiyil nee vandhaai
nanum enakillai

Kanneeril karuvaanen
kadal neeril uruvaanen
unnalae uyir aanen
neeyaaga naan aanen
neeyaaga naan aanen

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses feelings of longing and love, highlighting the emotional connection between two individuals.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Chinna, the song reflects the protagonist's emotional struggles and romantic aspirations.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary SPB, known for his soulful voice and impactful performances.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Yaar Yaaro Naan Parthaen was composed by D Imman, who is known for his melodious tunes.

When was this song released?

The song was released on July 15, 2005.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Yaar Yaaro Naan Parthaen, the protagonist navigates the complexities of love and longing, beautifully portrayed through SPB's emotive singing. The song encapsulates the essence of romantic yearning, making it a perfect fit for moments of reflection and nostalgia. With its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics, it evokes a sense of deep emotional connection. This track stands out as a memorable piece in the film Chinna, resonating with anyone who has experienced the highs and lows of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Yaar Yaaro Naan Parthaen from the movie Chinna is a soulful melody that captures the essence of longing and love. With the legendary SPB's enchanting vocals and D Imman's captivating composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet pangs of romance. Dive into this emotional journey that beautifully intertwines heartfelt lyrics with a mesmerizing tune.
stanzaMeanings: Who is it that I have seen? No one is with me. You came into my life, and I am also alone.
I am formed from tears, I am shaped from ocean water. Because of you, I have life; I have become you.
Who is it that I have seen? No one is with me.
You are a good person who can let go of your mother. I have seen God in you.
In the place where I speak, I have hidden myself within you.
If someone asks about me, I will just say one word: it is you.
If they ask about my face, I will just say your name.
Even if God comes and asks you, I will not give a reply; I will not give a reply.
Who is it that I have seen? No one is with me.
In the anger of the heart, you are like a fallen flower. I was the fire that burned, and you are the light that rises.
Until now, I thought this was enough for me.
You made me understand the taste of life, and I was born again.
I will hold you in my heart; I will not let you go outside; I will not let you go outside.
Who is it that I have seen? No one is with me. You came into my life, and I am also alone.
I am formed from tears, I am shaped from ocean water. Because of you, I have life; I have become you.
Who is it that I have seen?
